description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Manual build binary on MacOS (arm64) that can be triggered manually. In a single macos-14 job, set up Python 3.13.3 with pip caching, then upgrade pip. Install Qt 6.9.1, PyQt6, numpy, and other required modules. Build Veusz extensions, run tests with specific environment variables, build an installer, and finally upload the installer as an artifact named macos-arm-binary.
